title: Shop & Discovery Update
notes:
Shop & Discovery Update

- New Shop system for discovering games and Lumorix projects
- Clear separation between Shop and Library
- Smart local recommendations based on your installed content
- Structured tag system for better discovery and future scaling
- Refactored core platform to support more than just games
- Improved download, install, and update flows
- More stable updater with better error handling
- Cleaner and more consistent launcher UI
